summary: Authenticated Codex runtime, local secret-lifecycle guards including wrong-service disconnect blocking, stale post-logout image gate blocking, and a current-package configured secret/auth marker scan exist. The active dry-run archive and native app scan clean for the configured Codex/OpenAI secret, auth.json, local workspace, and long bearer token markers, with direct artifact regression coverage tying DF-205 to that package scan. Release evidence still lacks a clean-account login, logout/relogin, and packaged keychain lifecycle run.
